description: Interesting scenario: low-confidence semantic facts get demoted rather than deleted — action=demote drops their effective score in future recalls without removing them. Combines confidence_below and type filters.
notes: demote applies a server-side score-multiplier (default 0.25) to matched rows on subsequent recall, without modifying the row itself. The combination confidence_below=0.3 + older_than_days=30 + type=semantic captures: "stale, weakly-held facts" — a common cleanup target. Multiple policy keys are ANDed together.
